title: Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls
tagline: Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Kumbhavurutty Waterfall is a famous waterfalls in South India situated near Aryankavu panchayath in Kollam district of Kerala near Tamil Nadu border.
overview.description: Kumbhavurutty Waterfall is a famous waterfalls in South India situated near Aryankavu panchayath in Kollam district of Kerala near Tamil Nadu border. It is located 6.5 km away from Achenkovil. Palaruvi Falls is another nearby attraction of this falls.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Manalar Waterfalls
topPlaces.description: Manalar Waterfalls is situated at Achankovil in Kollam district of Kerala. It is on the eastern area of Kollam District and Konni forest.

topPlaces.name: Achankovil Sastha Temple
topPlaces.description: The Achankovil Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple located near the banks of the Achankovil River in the Kollam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is one of the five important temples dedicated to Shasta in Kerala, the others being Kulathupuzha, Aryankavu, Sabarimala and Kanthamala.

topPlaces.name: Pudur, Tirunelveli
topPlaces.description: Pudur (S) is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Adavinainar Dam
topPlaces.description: The Adavinainar Dam is located at the foothills of Western Ghats and border of Kerala, built across the Hanumanadhi River in Mekkarai village in the Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu, Southern India. The lands in Tenkasi District receiving canal and tank irrigation through Mettukkaal canel, Karisalkulam Pond, Panpolikulam Pond, Vallakkulam Pond, Ilathurkulam Pond, Nainagaram canel, Kilangadu Pond, Kambilikulam Pond, Pungan canel, Sambavar Vadakarai canel and Erattaikulam Pond.

items.note: Manalar Waterfalls is situated at Achankovil in Kollam district of Kerala. It is on the eastern area of Kollam District and Konni forest.

The Achankovil Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple located near the banks of the Achankovil River in the Kollam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is one of the five important temples dedicated to Shasta in Kerala, the others being Kulathupuzha, Aryankavu, Sabarimala and Kanthamala.
Pudur (S) is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

The Adavinainar Dam is located at the foothills of Western Ghats and border of Kerala, built across the Hanumanadhi River in Mekkarai village in the Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu, Southern India. The lands in Tenkasi District receiving canal and tank irrigation through Mettukkaal canel, Karisalkulam Pond, Panpolikulam Pond, Vallakkulam Pond, Ilathurkulam Pond, Nainagaram canel, Kilangadu Pond, Kambilikulam Pond, Pungan canel, Sambavar Vadakarai canel and Erattaikulam Pond.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls?
faq.a: Stays in Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kumbhavurutty Waterfalls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manalar Waterfalls, Achankovil Sastha Temple, Pudur, Tirunelveli, Adavinainar Dam.
